summary: 11 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Tiana
film.announcement: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara are in talks to write an original live-action film about Princess and the Frog's Tiana.

film.title: Ink
film.announcement: Netflix acquired distribution rights to Danny Boyle's Rupert Murdoch thriller 'Ink' ahead of its Venice Film Festival premiere.

film.title: Herbert West: Reanimator
film.announcement: First look revealed at Joseph Morgan and Katie Cassidy starring in the fantasy horror film adapted from H.P. Lovecraft's story.

film.title: Renegades
film.talent: Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley (directors)
film.announcement: Sony Pictures acquired short story 'Renegades' by Will Simmons with Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley attached to direct the action-thriller feature adaptation.

film.title: The Bell Jar
film.announcement: Ella Beatty is in final talks to join Focus Features' 'The Bell Jar' adaptation.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney (star), Lindsey Anderson Beer (writer/director), LuckyChap (producer)
film.announcement: Sony landed the 'Sleepy Hollow' package 'Hollow' with Sydney Sweeney starring, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap producing.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner
film.announcement: Harry Potter series star Ruari Spooner joined Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd in the comedy 'Bender'.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan
film.announcement: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon and Rob Morgan joined the cast of comedy 'Mini War'.

film.title: If I Tell You
film.announcement: Tessa Blake's 'If I Tell You' starring Carol Kane was acquired by Suncatcher Productions for distribution.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: Rowan Blanchard stars in school shooting-themed dark comedy 'The Drill' directed by Millicent Hailes.

film.title: Kaet Might Die
film.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet
film.announcement: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang and Zosia Mamet joined Mercedes Bryce Morgan's dark comedy 'Kaet Might Die'.

tv.title: God of War
tv.talent: Ryan Hurst (originally cast as Kratos, now recasting)
tv.announcement: Prime Video's 'God of War' series will recast the lead role of Kratos following Ryan Hurst's on-set injury.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: West Duchovny joined AMC's NASCAR drama series 'Thunder Road'.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.announcement: Roby Attal and Francesca Reale joined Netflix's 'This Summer Will Be Different' as Felix and Bridget.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Iko Uwais and Albert Hughes united for multi-generational crime series 'Jakarta' at Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveiled 'Queenstown', its first New Zealand series.

tv.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv.announcement: Details revealed on why episodes of the 'Big Bang Theory' spinoff 'Stuart Fails to Save the Universe' are so short.

tv.title: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship
tv.announcement: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship is launching a female-focused spinoff series on YouTube.

tv.title: Cape Fear
tv.announcement: Showrunner Nick Antosca brings the 'Blunt Force Trauma' of Martin Scorsese's 'Cape Fear' into the 2020s for a new adaptation.

tv.title: House Rules
tv.announcement: Creator Laro Benz jumped out of his comfort zone with Tubi's 'House Rules'.
